title: HyperTensor: Quantum-Inspired Tensor Networks for Computational Physics
description: A pure PyTorch implementation of Matrix Product States (MPS) and Matrix Product Operators (MPO) for many-body quantum physics and computational fluid dynamics. Features include DMRG ground state search, TEBD/TDVP time evolution, and compressible Euler solvers with shock-capturing schemes.
notes: This software implements tensor network algorithms for quantum physics (Heisenberg, TFIM, Bose-Hubbard models) and CFD (1D/2D compressible Euler equations with Riemann solvers).
